title: Device Home Screen - No Device connected - Supported List - User Guides
scenario: Supported Devices list and User Guides are accessible from the Poly Studio Mobile app home screen when no device is connected
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. On the Home screen, ensure no device is currently connected.
3. Locate and tap on the 'Supported Devices' option on the Home screen.
4. Verify that the Supported Devices list is displayed.
5. Under the 'User Guides' section, tap on the first device listed.
6. Observe the user guide that opens.
7. Return to the Supported Devices list.
8. Repeat steps 5-7 for each device listed under User Guides.
expected: The Supported Devices list is accessible from the Home screen when no device is connected. Tapping on each device under User Guides opens the correct and corresponding user guide for that specific device.
